name: Andouille a La Jeannine
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the andouille into 1/4-to 1/2-inch thick pieces.
2. In a covered skillet, mix together the dry white wine and honey until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture over the sliced andouille.
4. Cook over low heat until the andouille is tender.
Andouille is gumbo sausage for all you people who live away from the center of the universe. You can use other sausage and it would taste okay.
